greeting: Please, I mean no harm. I'm only passing through. My village... it's gone.
Have you food to spare? I've eaten nothing but roots for three days.
Don't look at me like that. I was a carpenter once. I had a home.
quest: My daughter was separated from me when we fled. She has a red ribbon in her hair. If you find her on the road, tell her I'm heading to Millbrook.
idle: I keep walking, but I don't know where I'm going anymore.
The smoke was visible for a whole day after we left...
